section_miscategorizations.text: The patient reports pain with all three maneuvers.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a patient-reported symptom in response to exam maneuvers; per template definitions, patient-reported symptoms belong in the Subjective section, even if elicited during the exam.

section_miscategorizations.text: Rescribe a splint for the right index finger.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This appears to be a typographical error for 'Prescribe a splint'; as written, 'Rescribe' is unclear but still functions as a management action. This is a wording issue rather than a section miscategorization.
